textByHash.08e80c06ef2df6a4946f8a8fde4e7f59cf445c79: F-f-f-fish... give him the f-f-f-fish he likes and he might f- f-f-fall asleep.
textByHash.12e615e09390f7fb2a7ca438d253517c39475e7a: Our love can never be, sweet .
textByHash.2630dbc62e38afbda69907cba8d66088cff8829b: If you want someone to show you round the castle ask Eohric, the Head Servant.
textByHash.6554ddea65819817929244193546a08fa95691ed: Look, I'd better not talk. I'll get in trouble.
textByHash.735cd19b39747d7007f50db67d45362440fe13c1: Meow! Errr... I c-c-c-can't help you... He'll kill us all!
textByHash.924b891b89db4c04f1d9ba2ac4dc1ee2b24dd96d: Look... over t-t-there! That fishing spot c-c-contains the f-f-f-fish he likes.
textByHash.9bea24ca57f8404cb6f568a79eab695eab6e01d7: You go, , I don't belong there... I belong here, in ScapeRune. This is the only place I can ever go...
textByHash.b5e697838f6d240f55614a339791efac276d3672: Go now! Go, and don't look back!
textByHash.bea1d7e933fb53fbf709c818986048db15159626: No, he's insane! He'll kill us all! Like he killed the others!
textByHash.d6f3ef5d46beb1ce521d85812d9ba2a5f5d7dfc9: No, I dare not leave this place.
textByHash.dfe4a99dae337b95396bd63aa302f512f1e66fcb: No, Evil Bob will track us down eventually and when he does...
